title: dryopteris reducta
intro: Dryopteris reducta, also known as the autumn fern or spinulose wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris reducta include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dryopteris reducta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
